===Etymology===
From {{inh|zh|sit-pro|*guŋ||body, back}}. Compare {{cog|my|အကောင်||body}}.

===Definitions===
{{head|zh|hanzi}}

# [[body]]
#: {{zh-x|鞠躬|to bow|lit=to bend one’s '''body'''}}
# [[oneself]]
# [[in person]]; [[personally]]
#* {{zh-x|臣 本 布衣，躬 耕 於 ^南陽。|I was originally a commoner. I '''personally''' farmed in Nanyang.|ref='''227''', {{lw|zh|諸葛亮}} ({{w|Zhuge Liang}}), {{lw|zh|s:zh:前出師表|前出師表}} ({{w|Chu Shi Biao|Former ''Chu Shi Biao''}})|CL}}
#* {{zh-x|童子 何 知？躬 逢 勝 餞。|As a child, what do I know? Yet I was able to '''personally''' attend this magnificent feast.|ref=late 7th century {{CE}}, {{lw|zh|王勃}} ({{w|Wang Bo}}), {{lw|zh|s:滕王閣序|滕王閣序}} ({{w|Tengwang Ge Xu|Preface to the Prince Teng Pavilion}})|CL}}
# to [[stoop]]
